description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed sword with a pointed tip and a symmetrical, double-edged design. The blade is flat and tapers evenly to a sharp point, with no visible fuller or decorative features. The crossguard is simple and flat, extending horizontally to provide hand protection. The handle is straight and cylindrical, ending in a small, flat pommel, and appears to be made of the same material as the blade, giving the entire object a uniform, dark metallic appearance. There are no visible engravings, wrappings, or embellishments on the handle or guard. The overall design is utilitarian and minimalistic, suggesting a focus on function over ornamentation.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a pointed tip, flat crossguard, and a simple cylindrical handle, all in a uniform dark metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, flat blade, symmetrical edges, and the simple crossguard and handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's narrowness.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the flat blade and minimalistic handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the sword's thin, straight profile.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, metallic, no visible grip texture or decoration
